fields.name: image
fields.label: Featured Image
fields.description: Shown on the Journal landing page and at the top of the post.

fields.name: excerpt
fields.label: Short Summary
fields.description: 1–2 sentences. Appears on the Journal list and in Google search results.

fields.name: tags
fields.label: Tags / Keywords
fields.description: Topics for this post (e.g. Anxiety, Relationships). Used for filtering, related posts, and SEO. Type a tag and press enter.

fields.name: metaDescription
fields.label: SEO Meta Description (optional)
fields.description: The blurb Google shows under the title (~155 characters). If left blank, the Short Summary above is used.
